#### The 5 Plugin Source Types

```json
// 1. Relative path (local plugin within the same Marketplace repo)
{ "source": "." }
{ "source": "./plugins/my-tool" }

// 2. GitHub repository (public or private)
{ "source": "github:myorg/my-plugin" }
{ "source": "github:myorg/my-plugin@v1.2.3" }

// 3. URL (raw ZIP or tarball)
{ "source": "https://example.com/releases/my-plugin-1.0.zip" }

// 4. GitHub subdirectory (plugin inside a monorepo)
{ "source": "github:myorg/monorepo/plugins/my-plugin" }

// 5. npm package
{ "source": "npm:@myorg/my-claude-plugin" }
{ "source": "npm:@myorg/my-claude-plugin@2.1.0" }
```
